summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarvbhasa multilingual AI platform - all features working perfectly. Tested backend APIs, frontend UI components, sidebar functionality, chat integration, text translation, speech to text UI, sign in authentication flow, and full user journey.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ endpoint returns correct response
Backend API /api/chat works with mocked responses
Backend API /api/translate works with mocked translation responses
Backend status endpoints (POST/GET) working correctly
Landing page loads with Hindi tagline 'भाषा बदले, मतलब नहीं' and English translation
CTA 'Experience Sarvbhasa' triggers 2-second loading animation
Loading animation transitions to main app successfully
Main app loads with collapsible sidebar containing all required menu items
Sidebar toggle functionality works (collapse/expand)
All sidebar navigation items present: Home, New Chat, Chat, Text to Text Translate, Speech to Text, Upgrade to Premium, Sign In
Chat page loads and integrates with backend /api/chat endpoint
User can type messages in chat and receive mocked responses
Text to Text Translate page loads with language selectors and text areas
Translation functionality integrates with backend /api/translate endpoint
Swap button functionality works correctly in translate page
Speech to Text page loads with mic button and language selector
Sign In modal opens with all authentication options (Google, Telegram, X/Twitter, Email)
Google sign in flow works - user can enter name and sign in
User appears in sidebar after successful sign in
User menu dropdown opens with Logout and Support/Help options
Support functionality shows Indian phone number (+91 90741 42341)
Back button returns to landing page correctly
Full user flow: Landing → Loading → Main App → Navigation → Back to Landing works seamlessly
